front.notes: source: device index (int) or URL (string). protocol: 'tcp' (http://) or 'udp' (udp://) for IP cameras. rotation: 0/90/180/270. zoom: 1.0=no change, <1.0=zoom out.

side.notes: protocol: 'tcp' or 'udp'. side: 'left' or 'right'. Set source to null to disable.

calibration.notes: camera_distance_meters: real-world distance between front and side cameras. user_height_meters: your height in meters.

osc.notes: protocol: 'udp' (default, low latency, LAN) or 'tcp' (reliable, works over internet/mobile data). ip: 127.0.0.1 for same PC, headset LAN IP for local Quest, public IP for remote.

smoothing.notes: 0.0 = no smoothing (raw/jittery), 1.0 = maximum smoothing (very laggy). 0.4-0.6 recommended.

trackers._note: VRChat OSC supports exactly 8 tracker slots. See https://docs.vrchat.com/docs/osc-trackers
trackers._note2: Recommendation: start with just hips+feet. Add more only if your tracking is accurate enough.
trackers._unsupported_note: The trackers below have NO VRChat OSC slot — tracked internally but never sent.

display.notes: Toggle camera preview windows and skeleton overlay. Disabling can improve performance.
